mapper.sql: id, job_name jobName, executor_group executorGroup, executor_handler executorHandler, executor_app executorApp, executor_param executorParam, job_status jobStatus, trigger_type triggerType, trigger_config triggerConfig, next_execute_time nextExecuteTime, `owner` owner, `tag` tag, remark remark, route_strategy routeStrategy, block_strategy blockStrategy, retry_count retryCount, create_time createTime, update_time updateTime
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO job_info ( job_name, executor_group, executor_handler, executor_app, executor_param, job_status, trigger_type, trigger_config, next_execute_time, `owner`, `tag`, retry_count, route_strategy, block_strategy, remark, create_time, update_time ) VALUES ( #{jobName}, #{executorGroup}, #{executorHandler}, #{executorApp}, #{executorParam}, #{jobStatus}, #{triggerType}, #{triggerConfig}, #{nextExecuteTime}, #{owner}, #{tag}, #{retryCount}, #{routeStrategy}, #{blockStrategy}, #{remark}, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE job_info SET job_name = #{jobName}, executor_group = #{executorGroup}, executor_handler = #{executorHandler}, executor_app = #{executorApp}, executor_param = #{executorParam}, job_status = #{jobStatus}, trigger_type = #{triggerType}, trigger_config = #{triggerConfig}, next_execute_time = #{nextExecuteTime}, `owner` = #{owner}, `tag` = #{tag}, remark = #{remark}, retry_count = #{retryCount}, route_strategy = #{routeStrategy}, block_strategy = #{blockStrategy}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE job_info SET job_status = #{status}, next_execute_time = #{nextExecuteTime}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE job_info SET next_execute_time = #{nextExecuteTime}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM job_info WHERE job_status = 1 AND next_execute_time IS NOT NULL AND next_execute_time <= #{currentTime} ORDER BY next_execute_time ASC

SELECT
FROM job_info ORDER BY id DESC
